TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Byron Beck tatama, nalecuhan i Ellensburg, Washington, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Byron Beck i 1967 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 15, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. siwkay niza 1 bulad 25 demiad, 1945 a mihca, Byron Beck, miunduay. tatama ciniza , u kawaw niza sa u mimaliay. u Amilika a tademaw, sangelacay ku banges. u banggu niza sa 40(sepat a bataan).
S.PHON: bjron b…ô ¶k tatama, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i …ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ônsburg, wasńßiŇčton, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. bjron b…ô ¶k i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu ¶ńßi ¶ago bur~…ĺr~…ĺs putiput. siwkaj niza * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, bjron b…ô ¶k, miunduaj. tatama ¶iniza , u kawaw niza sa u mimar~…ĺiaj. u amir~…ĺika a tad…ômaw, saŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj ku baŇč…ôs. u baŇčgu niza sa **(s…ôpat a bataan).
S.FORM: Byron Beck tatama, nalecuhan i Ellensburg, Washington, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Byron Beck i 1967 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 15, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. siwkay niza 1 bulad 25 demiad, 1945 a mihca, Byron Beck, miunduay. tatama ciniza , u kawaw niza sa u mimaliay. u Amilika a tademaw, sangelacay ku banges. u banggu niza sa 40(sepat a bataan).
S.PHON: bjron b…ô ¶k tatama, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i …ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ônsburg, wasńßiŇčton, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. bjron b…ô ¶k i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu ¶ńßi ¶ago bur~…ĺr~…ĺs putiput. siwkaj niza * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, bjron b…ô ¶k, miunduaj. tatama ¶iniza , u kawaw niza sa u mimar~…ĺiaj. u amir~…ĺika a tad…ômaw, saŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj ku baŇč…ôs. u baŇčgu niza sa **(s…ôpat a bataan).
